meaning: adj.亲切的,有礼貌的,愿意帮人忙的
examples: He is an extremely pleasant and obliging man.
They were very obliging and offered to wait for us.
He is very obliging. He's sure to help if you ask him.
Certain strictures, like obliging men to wear traditional robes, are a small price to pay.
It is rare to see a koala, although rock wallabies and goannas are more obliging.
